case_title: CAPITOL ONE BANK(U.S.A),N.A. VS. TIM G BAILEY et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION REGARDING CALCULATION OF PRE-JUDGMENT INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITOL ONE BANK(U.S.A),N.A.
